objective: Create one disposable proof artifact containing the supplied nonce, commit it, validate the exact content, and stop.

repository.name: desktop-gnhf-disposable-proof
repository.branchContext: Use an isolated GNHF worktree based on the clean disposable repository branch.

forbiddenScope: Remote pushes, merges, deployments, credentials, and provider authentication
expectedArtifacts: One committed proof/gnhf-desktop-proof.txt containing the exact runtime nonce
safetyConstraints: Keep the disposable base checkout clean
Do not push, merge, deploy, authenticate providers, or handle secrets
